- Pod was in ImagePullBackOff status
- Root cause: Typo in image name "nginx:latst" 
- Image could not be pulled due to incorrect tag

## FIX
- Used kubectl patch to correct the image name from "nginx:latst" to "nginx:latest"
- Updated the deployment spec to use the correct image

FIX COMPLETE
